bead.title: web: implement federated worker control queue mutation and spec editing:: part 1
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Parent bead ddx-05373ec5 is too broad for one execution pass. This child owns part 1 of 2 of that parent scope.

ROOT CAUSE
PROBLEM
Parent bead ddx-e951255c is too broad for one execution pass. This child owns part 3 of 3 of that parent scope.

ROOT CAUSE
PROBLEM
The web UI must let an operator control spoke workers, mutate queues, and edit specs from one server surface once the backend exposes owner-targeted write support.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/workers/+layout.svelte:12 defines local StartWorker/StopWorker mutations without owner-target routing inputs or federated target handling.
- cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/beads/+layout.svelte:92 has create-form state, but TC-018 requires create, edit, lifecycle, invalid-state refusal, and federated write flows.
- cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/documents/[...path]/+page.svelte:89 defines DocumentWrite with only path/content and cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/documents/[...path]/+page.svelte:311 saves without expected hash/version.
- docs/helix/03-test/test-plans/TP-002-server-web-ui.md:327 through docs/helix/03-test/test-plans/TP-002-server-web-ui.md:364 define the required federated worker, bead, and spec editing E2E flows.

PROPOSED FIX
- Add UI routing/state so hub views can select local or spoke owner targets and call the backend owner-targeted mutations.
- Complete bead create/edit/lifecycle forms with required-note validation, error display, refresh, and project isolation.
- Update document/spec editing to pass expected hash/version, show stale-write conflicts, keep path confinement errors visible, and refresh graph/staleness state after save.
- Ensure all mutation flows show node/project context and never fabricate success rows for offline/read_only spokes.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement backend forwarding in this bead except adapting to completed GraphQL contracts. Do not add a full filesystem editor, Axon backend, or managed-node outbound channel.

PROPOSED FIX
Implement only this child acceptance slice:
- `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bunx playwright test e2e/federation-worker-control.spec.ts e2e/beads-queue-mutations.spec.ts e2e/spec-editing.spec.ts` passes.
- `cd cli && go test -short ./internal/server/...` passes.
- `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assig
...[truncated]

PROPOSED FIX
Implement only this child acceptance slice:
- `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bunx playwright test e2e/federation-worker-control.spec.ts e2e/beads-queue-mutations.spec.ts e2e/spec-editing.spec.ts` passes.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads. Preserve every parent non-scope constraint unless this child explicitly narrows it.
bead.acceptance: 1. `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bunx playwright test e2e/federation-worker-control.spec.ts e2e/beads-queue-mutations.spec.ts e2e/spec-editing.spec.ts` passes.
